title: build_request allocs Vec<String> on every JMAP call
description: build_request() unconditionally does vec\!["urn:ietf:params:jmap:core".to_string()] plus one .push(cap.to_string()) per extra cap, producing a heap-allocated Vec<String> on every single JMAP method call (48 call sites, all passing exactly &["urn:ietf:params:jmap:chat"]). The resulting JmapRequest.using field is serialized once and discarded. Since all capability URIs are &'static str, the using field could be typed as Vec<&'static str> or Cow<'static, [&'static str]>, eliminating 2 heap allocations per API call with no behavioral change. Impact: every Chat/get, Message/set, etc. call pays two unnecessary String clones before the HTTP request is even constructed.
